# Vendor Registry

One source of truth for every vendor at every store. GMs love this. 
When something breaks, someone leaves, or a contract needs to be cancelled — it's all here.

## Stores
- [Brian Harris BMW](./brian-harris-bmw.md)
- [Audi Baton Rouge](./audi-baton-rouge.md)
- [BMW of Jackson](./bmw-of-jackson.md)
- [Harris Porsche](./harris-porsche.md)

## How to Use
- Each store has its own file
- Each vendor entry includes: name, category, POC, contact info, monthly cost, contract term, notes
- Update whenever a vendor is added, changed, or cancelled
- Flag vendors that are redundant, underperforming, or ripe for consolidation

## Categories
- DMS (Dealer Management System)
- CRM
- SEM / Paid Search
- SEO
- Website / Digital Retailing
- Social Media
- Email Marketing
- Video / Photography
- Inventory Management
- Finance / F&I Tools
- Service / Fixed Ops
- Other
